ddls:
CREATE TABLE "executables" (
  "exec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each executable file */,
  "filename" TEXT /* Name of the executable file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the executable file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Total size of the executable file in bytes */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path where the file is stored */,
  "md5_hash" TEXT /* MD5 hash of the file for integrity checks */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the file is currently active or archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exec_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each memory segment */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the memory segment (e.g., .text, .data, .bss) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the memory segment */,
  "default_size" INTEGER /* Default size of the segment for comparison */,
  "is_critical" INTEGER /* Indicates if the segment is critical for the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "executable_segments" (
  "exec_seg_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association between an executable and a segment */,
  "exec_id" INTEGER /* ID of the executable file */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the memory segment */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the memory segment in bytes */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the segment size was last analyzed */,
  "analysis_tool" TEXT /* Name of the tool used for analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exec_seg_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_executable_segments_exec_id FOREIGN KEY ("exec_id") REFERENCES executables ("exec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_executable_segments_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES segments ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, auditor, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the executable file */,
  "exec_id" INTEGER /* ID of the executable file being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the executable file was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, analyze) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the file */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_exec_id FOREIGN KEY ("exec_id") REFERENCES executables ("exec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_history" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "exec_id" INTEGER /* ID of the executable file */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the executable file */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Detailed changelog for the version */,
  "is_major" INTEGER /* Indicates if the version is a major release */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_history_exec_id FOREIGN KEY ("exec_id") REFERENCES executables ("exec_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "segment_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each segment size change */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version entry */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the memory segment */,
  "old_size" INTEGER /* Old size of the segment in bytes */,
  "new_size" INTEGER /* New size of the segment in bytes */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was detected */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change in segment size */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., addition, removal, modification) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_segment_changes_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES version_history ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_segment_changes_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES segments ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role that the permission applies to */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the permission is a default permission for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_perm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association between a user and a permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  "is_restricted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the permission is restricted to specific files or actions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_perm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "exec_id" INTEGER /* ID of the executable file */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the analysis */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed analysis results */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, HTML) */,
  "is_shared" INTEGER /* Indicates if the report is shared with other users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_exec_id FOREIGN KEY ("exec_id") REFERENCES executables ("exec_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_keys" (
  "api_key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API key */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the API key */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* The actual API key string */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the API key's purpose */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the API key */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Date and time the API key was last used */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the API key has been used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("api_key_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_keys_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_usage_logs" (
  "usage_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API usage log entry */,
  "api_key_id" INTEGER /* ID of the API key used for access */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the API was accessed */,
  "endpoint" TEXT /* Endpoint accessed through the API */,
  "response_status" TEXT /* Status of the API response */,
  "request_method" TEXT /* HTTP method used (e.g., GET, POST) */,
  "request_body" TEXT /* Request body for debugging purposes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_usage_logs_api_key_id FOREIGN KEY ("api_key_id") REFERENCES api_keys ("api_key_id")
)
